name: LUNA Mini
benchmark_room: 22 m² recommended room size (also widely marketed with larger one-pass coverage figures)

name: AERLUNE S1
benchmark_reference: Levoit Core 300S Smart True HEPA Air Purifier
benchmark_noise: Peak tested decibel reported at 58 dB in pet-air-purifier testing; another small-air-purifier test reports 48 dB on high

name: AERLUNE Pro 600
benchmark_cadr: Smoke 240 CFM / Dust 242 CFM / Pollen 249 CFM
benchmark_noise: 35 dB sleep mode; about 65–70 dB turbo in WIRED testing
benchmark_room: Up to 1,800 sq ft in one hour at 1 ACH; 900 sq ft in 30 minutes at 2 ACH

name: AERLUNE H2
benchmark_cadr: Dyson models often do not use CADR as the primary rating in buyer guides; CADR not available in selected source
benchmark_noise: Highest speed measured at 57.3 dB average in SELF review of Pure Humidify + Cool
benchmark_room: 41 m³ coverage cited in humidifier guide
